summary_en: FY3/26 final dividend raised from ¥24.00 to ¥25.00 per share. Modification driven by results exceeding forecast; subject to shareholder approval at the 32nd ordinary general meeting (scheduled 2026-06-25).
title_en: Notice of Dividend Forecast Revision (Dividend Hike) for Fiscal Year Ended March 2026
translation_en_brief: On 2026-05-14, Space Shower Skiyaki Holdings resolved at a board meeting to revise its interim and full-year dividend forecast for fiscal year ending March 2026. The company raised the final dividend per share from ¥24.00 (previously forecast on 2026-02-13) to ¥25.00, with no interim dividend. The adjustment reflects stronger-than-expected results for the fiscal year. The modification is conditional on approval at the company's 32nd ordinary general meeting, scheduled for 2026-06-25.
